overview: TrafficAI is a full-stack traffic management dashboard with role-based access for Control Panel operators, Emergency responders, Traffic Users, and Traffic Police. Features a shared live map synced across all tabs, emergency alert management with acknowledge/respond tracking, notification badges, and real-time signal monitoring.
features: 4-tab role navigation: Control Panel, Emergency Panel, Traffic User, Traffic Police
Shared interactive map synced in real-time across all 4 tabs
Notification badges for new critical/high-urgency alerts
Acknowledge and Respond buttons on emergency messages with status tracking
Traffic signal grid with read/write controls based on role
Emergency alert submission and dispatch management
Traffic Police dispatch interface with alert filtering
Read-only Traffic User view of signal status and congestion
